events.title: Fairytale Town morning + Land Park brunch
events.label: Best all-around
events.time: Sat or Sun morning, go early before heat
events.food: Brunch nearby in Land Park / Freeport corridor
events.why: Purpose-built for small kids, easy stroller flow, short attention-span friendly, and close enough to bail out before nap.

events.title: German Maifest family festival
events.label: Festival + food
events.cost: Check event page; children may be discounted/free
events.why: A family-friendly cultural festival with food, music, and enough visual energy to keep a toddler engaged in short bursts.

events.title: Sacramento Public Library storytime backup
events.label: Free + easy
events.food: Pick a branch near coffee or lunch
events.why: Short, structured, indoor, and designed for babies through preschoolers when everyone needs a low-friction plan.

events.title: California State Railroad Museum + Old Sacramento food loop
events.label: Indoor anchor
events.time: Sat or Sun, late morning works well
events.food: Old Sacramento restaurants, treats, and coffee nearby
events.why: Big trains are high-impact toddler magic, the museum gives shade/AC, and the waterfront loop adds food stops without needing a long drive.

events.title: SMUD Museum of Science and Curiosity
events.label: Hands-on backup
events.why: Interactive exhibits, riverfront stroller access, bathrooms, and enough indoor novelty to save a too-hot or too-windy morning.

events.title: Sacramento Sunday Certified Farmers Market
events.label: Market snacks
events.food: Market fruit, pastries, coffee, and samples when available
events.why: A simple morning loop: snacks, people-watching, produce colors, and an exit whenever the nap clock starts getting loud.

events.title: Davis Farmers Market day trip
events.label: 45-min market
events.time: Sat morning or check market schedule
events.food: Produce, baked goods, coffee, picnic snacks
events.why: A manageable drive for a bigger market feel, with lawn space and an easy stroller loop for snack browsing.

events.title: Effie Yeaw Nature Center + short trail
events.label: Nature reset
events.why: Animals, shaded trails, river habitat, and easy turnaround points make this a strong toddler nature option.

events.title: Funderland Amusement Park
events.label: Tiny rides
events.why: Small rides, quick loops, and a toddler-scale footprint make it easy to do one happy hour and leave before the meltdown zone.

events.title: Midtown food and dessert crawl
events.label: Treat stop
events.food: Coffee, pastries, ice cream, casual lunch
events.why: A flexible food-focused outing when a full event feels like too much: pick two stops, stroller walk, then head home.

events.title: Crocker Art Museum family stop
events.label: Quiet indoor
events.why: A calm indoor swap when energy is lower: short gallery loop, stroller-friendly spaces, and a downtown food pairing.

events.title: McKinley Park rose garden + playground
events.label: Neighborhood easy
events.food: East Sac coffee and pastries nearby
events.why: Pretty walk, playground, ducks nearby, and an easy coffee pairing if you need a low-stakes outing without tickets.
